bsc_science.name: Bachelor of Science — regular programme

children.label: Complete 36 credits of first-year Science Mathematics
Complete 18 credits Mathematics and 18 credits Statistics
Complete an approved 18-credit Science Mathematics course
Complete an approved 18-credit Science Statistics course

curriculum_rules.label: Approved non-Science electives (first 72 credits)
curriculum_rules.approval_note: Non-Science elective recognition requires a Science Student Advisor or Deputy Dean; handbook exclusions and duplicate-credit rules apply.

curriculum_rules.label: Additional non-Science electives in a hierarchical sequence
curriculum_rules.approval_note: Beyond 72 non-Science credits, the courses must form an approved hierarchical sequence. The static transcript cannot verify that approval.

progression_rules.label: At least 72 credits in the preceding year
Able to complete within one further year
progression_rules.note: The transcript and static catalogue cannot fully verify future timetable and offering feasibility.

progression_rules.label: Degree expected by end of fourth year

legacy_pre_2023.name: First registered before 2023

progression_rules.label: Legacy regular: all first-year major requirements
Legacy regular: senior course equivalents by fourth year
Legacy degree expected by end of fifth year

legacy_pre_2023.availability_note: Use only for a student first registered before 2023.

admission_notes: Formal acceptance into some majors occurs only at second-year registration and may be capacity-limited.
progression_notes: Progression outcomes remain decisions of the Faculty Examinations Committee and Senate.
award_notes: Science distinction uses first-attempt passes only; supplementary passes do not count.

source.section: Rules for the BSc degree
